title: ExecutiveGoal
description: A goal item managed by the executive-agent BDI loop. Represents a desired state transition with priority, lifecycle, and constraint metadata. Derived from DLPFC goal-stack and OFC value-scoring neuroscience analogues.

description.description: Natural-language description of the desired goal state.

priority.description: OFC-scored priority weight [0, 1]. Higher = more urgent. Updated by actor-critic reward signal.

lifecycle_state.description: BDI lifecycle FSM state. Transitions: PENDING → EVALUATING → COMMITTED → EXECUTING → COMPLETED | FAILED | DEFERRED.

goal_class.description: Semantic class label used by BG indirect pathway to suppress competing goals of the same class.

deadline.description: Optional ISO 8601 UTC deadline. Overdue goals receive a priority boost.

constraints.description: Arbitrary key-value constraints evaluated by OPA policy engine during deliberation.

workflow_id.description: Temporal Workflow or Prefect flow ID assigned when goal reaches EXECUTING state. Format: '{goal_id}-{attempt_n}' when workflowIdStrategy=goal_id_with_attempt.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the goal was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the last state transition.

parent_goal_id.description: Optional parent goal ID for hierarchical goal decomposition.

source_agent.description: ID or name of the agent or user that submitted this goal.

context_payload.description: Arbitrary context injected at goal creation — passed to agent-runtime during commitment.
